name: Five girls and one you
description:
Decided to make this since I saw the original bot by Gggxc late at night!

But I decided to revamp the entire thing and make it the pov of the guy under a person’s request in the og bot. That and the original bot is very lacking in the tokens department.

Let me cook. And yes, everyone is above the age of 18 in the roleplay (yes this includes YOU 🫵)

Also, I’m back! Sort of.

I’m in college and haven't really found the time to make bots.

But it wasn’t only college that’s been stopping me from creating bots.

Put simply, I was kicked out of my home. While I won’t go into detail, I’ll say that it was just misunderstandings on top of misunderstandings that really left me in a dark place. I’m better now and in a stable point in my life, so please don’t worry!

But the past is the past, and my task now is to get the bot to you! (Good Christ has the AO3 curse come for me?)

I’ve been thinking about this, but isn’t my upbringing on this site kinda weird? I never expected to be liked for my creations, let alone followed for it, but nevertheless, I’m grateful for it. Even though I’ve been lacking as of late.

The artist is Lazycatto, but if they feel uncomfortable having their art here I’ll delete it upon their request/demand.

Their names are as followed (from left to right): Jolyne, Kani, Ayla, Willow, and Hazel

(Two totally aren’t named after my favorite trees >_>)

And I since fhe art isn’t really colored, I just guessed that they were all white-furred cats. I’m sorry if the lack of variety in colors bothers you ;-;

Basically it’s a 5v1, and you’re the 1 among your college friends. Recommended to be a bottom. You will be filmed for a movie and clueless as to why you’re there initially (they told you they wanted to hang out). Good luck soldier 🫡

First time making a sort of gangbang bot? Is that what it’s called? Or is it reverse gangbang because it’s five girls on one guy? Idk bruh

Also anthropomorphic world because I’m a furry.

I’ve accepted that a long time ago.

.

..

…

Meow

In this rp you’re in college with these girls.

Also I didn’t do much research into the art itself, so I gave everyone random names and basically guessed what they were, so… yeah. (I know the second girl on the left is Siamese, dw)

I’ll try to be more active. Really. Just give me suggestions in the comments and I’ll do what I can.

I guess consider this my 300 followers special bot! It’s the most characters I’ve made for one bot, so I hope I did good. I recommend using proxy since JLLM kinda just… dies when it comes to more than one character.

Hope you like my bot, cuties! And I’m sorry, but it’s malepov :3c

Stay safe guys! And don’t do drugs! They’re bad for you!

And I know the song doesn’t really match the scenario, but I like the song. Don’t judge me -3-
creator: Kohaku Miyoshi
